name: Discover information of a Lead based on Phone Number

content.query:
SELECT
cst.CustomerID
,cst.Phone
,lds.LeadID
,lds.EntryDate
,dsp.Disposition
,srs.LeadSubSource
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
 ,EDW.FACT_LEAD lds
 ,EDW.DIM_DISPOSITION dsp
 ,EDW.DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE srs
 where 
 cst.CustomerID = lds.CustomerID
 and lds.DispositionID = dsp.DispositionID
 and lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
 and cst.Phone in (
'9206519094'
,'2623214033'
 ,'2622692293'
 )
 order by 
 cst.CustomerID
 ,lds.EntryDate asc


select * from EDW.FACT_CALL
where Phone IN
(
'9206519094'
,'2623214033'
 ,'2622692293'
 ) order by Phone, CallDate


Phone number 9206519094  --  customer ID 563354
 
Phone number 2623214033  --  customer ID 567711
 
Phone number 2622692293  --  customer ID 565700
